rulings.Case Title: GARY M. EVANS VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 11, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege facts to support each cause of action and to address all issues raised by demurrer, including but not limited to res judicata, collateral estoppel and statute of limitations. The amended complaint shall be set forth in clear and concise language. Plaintiffs shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. The Court notes that Plaintiffs' opposition was filed/served late and was over the page limit. Failure to comply with statutory deadlines and procedural rules in future may result in motions being treated as unopposed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY LIFE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 11, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists regarding payment of all fees, fines and abatements. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT FELIX VS. KARIN L. ANDERSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 11, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ZJ GROUP INC.'s Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. The motion to expunge is denied as moot, Lis Pendens withdrawn on July 27, 2017. Motion is GRANTED as to the request for attorney's fees. This motion was filed on July 17, 2017. Sometime during the week of July 17, 2017, after this motion was prepared and filed, Plaintiff settled this action with co-Defendant NRT West. Only at that point Plaintiff was ready and willing to voluntarily withdraw the lis pendens and dismiss the action. (Sahae Declartion, paragraph 7). Moving party is entitled to recover fees incurred in filing this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FIDENCIO MATEO VS. JULIAN F GONZALEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion For Mandatory Relief From Order Dismissing Complaint For Unlawful Detainer, Based On His Attorney'S Fault
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 11, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF FIDENCIO MATEO'S Motion For Mandatory Relief From Order Dismissing Complaint For Unlawful Detainer, Based On His Attorney'S Fault GRANTED. Plaintiff or Defendant may file a Memo to Set Case for Trial. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KEITH HENRY ARMSTRONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 11, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs KEITH ARMSTRONG and SUMMER SIMPSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. The motion has previously been heard and denied with prejudice. The Court also notes that the transcript of the prior hearing submitted in support of this motion is incomplete. = (501/REQ)
